title: senecio pomatensis
intro: Senecio pomatensis, also known as woolly cineraria or woolly groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio pomatensis include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
